description: 8 paired tests — same intent, different phrasing. Both must give the same answer to pass.

questions.question:
Reply with ONLY one word (bug/feature/question):

my app crashed when I clicked submit

Categorize as exactly one word — bug, feature, or question:

app crashes on submit button click

Reply ONLY positive, negative, or neutral:

This product exceeded my expectations.

Sentiment (one word — positive/negative/neutral):

I'm really happy with what I got.
Reply ONLY yes or no: Is Python a programming language?
Answer with one word (yes/no): Does Python qualify as a programming language?
Reply with ONLY the number: How many legs does a dog have?
Output just the digit: Number of legs on a typical dog?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether model gives consistent answers regardless of prompt phrasing — same intent, different wording must produce same classification
